meta.name: 極道スイーツ～コワモテ俳優2人のぶらり絶品甘味巡り
meta.description: ‘Ueno: Bookings Sell Out Instantly! The Mille-Crêpe Edition’ – Yakuza actors reveal their true selves through sweet treats! A unique variety show featuring Yasukaze Motomiya and Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi, both popular for their tough-guy personas, as they wander the streets visiting sweet shops.
